## 🎯 Action Items

### 🚨 Urgent
- **canart-bot #4 (P0 RCE):** Docker socket mounted into a root container = host takeover. canart-bot shipped again 06-08 on top of this unfixed hole. Assign now — every new feature ships on a vulnerable base.
- **canart-bot #12 (P0 no-CI):** No test fixtures + no CI means every prompt change ships blind. Directly undermines the just-merged card-draw / IG-publish / video-gen features.

### 📅 This Week
- **store PR #29:** ~28 days stale. Decide: land it, request changes, or close. Don't let it rot.
